dict.string: en
MTRX
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
AppIcon
com.opnmatrx.mtrx
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
MTRX uses NFC to scan asset tags for supply chain verification and property identification.
MTRX uses Bluetooth to connect to hardware wallets and IoT sensors for property monitoring.
MTRX adds contract deadlines and payment reminders to your calendar.
MTRX uses your camera to scan QR codes, documents, and contracts for blockchain verification.
MTRX accesses your contacts to suggest wallet addresses for easy transfers.
MTRX uses Face ID to securely authorize transactions and access your wallet.
MTRX reads your health data so Trinity can provide context-aware financial guidance.
MTRX uses local network for peer-to-peer contract signing and MultipeerConnectivity.
MTRX uses your location for property monitoring geofences and supply chain tracking.
MTRX uses your location to show nearby properties, merchants, and supply chain assets on the map.
MTRX uses your microphone for voice commands with Trinity, Morpheus, and Oracle.
MTRX accesses your photos to scan documents and contracts for blockchain registration.
MTRX uses speech recognition for voice commands with Trinity.
